abstract.t: The Identifier Locator Network Protocol (ILNP) for IPv6 is described in Experimental RFCs 6740-6744. This document describes how values for ILNP data-types SHOULD be represented in textual form. These data-types are: the Locator (L64), the Node Identifier (NID), and the Identifier-Locator Vector (I-LV). The notation for the textual representation is defined formally. Use-cases are provided as examples of real world usage. This document updates RFC6740, RFC6741, RFC6742.
